sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24039" key="dendroko/pion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δενδρο-κόπιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n24039.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tree-cutting,</tr_> name of a festival, Herzog <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Koische Forschungen</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:p.133" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.133</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
